title: Specialists Configuration
description: Schema for specialists.yaml — both the built-in resources/specialists.yaml and filesystem overrides in ~/etc/kokos/libs/<lib>/MCP_TOOLS/specialists.yaml. File paths are resolved relative to the directory containing the specialists.yaml file.

specialists.description: Map of specialist ID to specialist definition. The key is the specialist ID used at runtime (e.g. "default", "technical-assistant").

title.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI.

description.description: Optional short description of the specialist's purpose and specialization.

file.description: Path to the Markdown file containing the specialist's system prompt. Resolved relative to the directory of the specialist.yaml file.
